| `TCPC_REG_POWER_CTRL_AUTO_DISCHARGE_DISCONNECT` | macro | 246 | Bit for enabling the automatic vbus discharge based on the vbus voltage. |
| `TCPC_REG_POWER_CTRL_BLEED_DISCHARGE` | macro | 248 | Bit for enabling the bleed discharge of vbus. |
| `TCPC_REG_POWER_CTRL_FORCE_DISCHARGE` | macro | 250 | Bit for enabling the forced vbus discharge. |
| `TCPC_REG_POWER_CTRL_VCONN_SUPP` | macro | 257 | Bit for enabling the vconn power supported. |
| `TCPC_REG_POWER_CTRL_VCONN_EN` | macro | 259 | Bit for enabling the vconn sourcing to CC line. |

| `TCPC_REG_CC_STATUS_CC2_STATE_MASK` | macro | 268 | Mask for CC2 line state. |
| `TCPC_REG_CC_STATUS_CC2_STATE` | macro | 274 | Macro to extract the status value of CC2 line. |
| `TCPC_REG_CC_STATUS_CC1_STATE_MASK` | macro | 276 | Mask for CC1 line state. |
| `TCPC_REG_CC_STATUS_CC1_STATE` | macro | 278 | Macto to extract the status value of CC1 line. |

| `TCPC_REG_POWER_STATUS_DEBUG_ACC_CON` | macro | 283 | Bit for debug accessory connected. |
| `TCPC_REG_POWER_STATUS_UNINIT` | macro | 285 | Bit for internal initialization in-progress. |
| `TCPC_REG_POWER_STATUS_SOURCING_HV` | macro | 287 | Bit for sourcing high voltage. |
| `TCPC_REG_POWER_STATUS_SOURCING_VBUS` | macro | 289 | Bit for sourcing vbus. |

| `TCPC_REG_POWER_STATUS_VBUS_PRES` | macro | 296 | Bit for vbus present. |

| `TCPC_REG_POWER_STATUS_SINKING_VBUS` | macro | 300 | Bit for sinking vbus. |
| `TCPC_REG_FAULT_STATUS` | macro | 303 | Register address - fault status. |
| `TCPC_REG_FAULT_STATUS_ALL_REGS_RESET` | macro | 305 | Bit for all registers reset to default. |
| `TCPC_REG_FAULT_STATUS_FORCE_OFF_VBUS` | macro | 307 | Bit for force vbus off due to external fault. |
| `TCPC_REG_FAULT_STATUS_AUTO_DISCHARGE_FAIL` | macro | 309 | Bit for auto discharge failed. |
| `TCPC_REG_FAULT_STATUS_FORCE_DISCHARGE_FAIL` | macro | 311 | Bit for force discharge failed. |
| `TCPC_REG_FAULT_STATUS_VBUS_OVER_CURRENT` | macro | 313 | Bit for internal or external vbus over current. |
| `TCPC_REG_FAULT_STATUS_VBUS_OVER_VOLTAGE` | macro | 315 | Bit for internal or external vbus over voltage. |
| `TCPC_REG_FAULT_STATUS_VCONN_OVER_CURRENT` | macro | 317 | Bit for vconn over current. |

| `TCPC_REG_ALERT_EXT_TIMER_EXPIRED` | macro | 329 | Bit for timer expired. |
| `TCPC_REG_ALERT_EXT_SRC_FRS` | macro | 331 | Bit for source fast role swap. |
| `TCPC_REG_ALERT_EXT_SNK_FRS` | macro | 333 | Bit for sink fast role swap. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND` | macro | 336 | Register address - command. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_WAKE_I2C` | macro | 338 | Value for wake i2c command. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_DISABLE_VBUS_DETECT` | macro | 340 | Value for disable vbus detect command - disable vbus present and vSafe0V detection. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_ENABLE_VBUS_DETECT` | macro | 342 | Value for enable vbus detect command - enable vbus present and vSafe0V detection. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_SNK_CTRL_LOW` | macro | 344 | Value for disable sink vbus - disable sinking power over vbus. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_SNK_CTRL_HIGH` | macro | 346 | Value for sink vbus - enable sinking power over vbus and vbus present detection. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_SRC_CTRL_LOW` | macro | 348 | Value for disable source vbus - disable sourcing power over vbus. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_SRC_CTRL_DEF` | macro | 350 | Value for source vbus default voltage - enable sourcing vSafe5V over vbus. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_SRC_CTRL_HV` | macro | 352 | Value for source vbus high voltage - enable sourcing high voltage over vbus. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_LOOK4CONNECTION` | macro | 354 | Value for look for connection - start DRP toggling if DRP role is set. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_RX_ONE_MORE` | macro | 359 | Value for rx one more Configure receiver to automatically clear the receive_detect register after sending next GoodCRC. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_SEND_FRS_SIGNAL` | macro | 364 | Value for send fast role swap signal Send FRS if TCPC is source with FRS enabled in power control register. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_RESET_TRANSMIT_BUF` | macro | 366 | Value for reset transmit buffer - TCPC resets the pointer of transmit buffer to offset 1. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_RESET_RECEIVE_BUF` | macro | 371 | Value for reset receive buffer If buffer pointer is at 132 or less, it is reset to 1, otherwise it is reset to 133. |
| `TCPC_REG_COMMAND_I2CIDLE` | macro | 373 | Value for i2c idle. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1` | macro | 376 | Register address - device capabilities 1. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_VBUS_NONDEFAULT_TARGET` | macro | 378 | Bit for vbus high voltage target - if set, VBUS_HV_TARGET register is implemented. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_VBUS_OCP_REPORTING` | macro | 380 | Bit for vbus over current reporting - if set, vbus over current is reported by TCPC. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_VBUS_OVP_REPORTING` | macro | 382 | Bit for vbus over voltage reporting - if set, vbus over voltage is reported by TCPC. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_BLEED_DISCHARGE` | macro | 384 | Bit for bleed discharge - if set, bleed discharge is implemented in TCPC. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_FORCE_DISCHARGE` | macro | 386 | Bit for force discharge - if set, force discharge is implemented in TCPC. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_VBUS_MEASURE_ALARM_CAPABLE` | macro | 391 | Bit for vbus measurement and alarm capable If set, TCPC supports vbus voltage measurement and vbus voltage alarms. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SRC_RESISTOR_MASK` | macro | 393 | Mask for source resistor supported. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SRC_RESISTOR` | macro | 399 | Macro to extract the supported source resistors from register value The value can be cast to enum tc_rp_value and value can be treated as highest amperage supported since the TCPC has also to support lower values than specified. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SRC_RESISTOR_RP_DEF` | macro | 402 | Value for Rp default only - only default amperage is supported. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SRC_RESISTOR_RP_1P5_DEF` | macro | 404 | Value for Rp 1.5A and default - support for 1.5A and for default amperage. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SRC_RESISTOR_RP_3P0_1P5_DEF` | macro | 406 | Value for Rp 3.0A, 1.5A and default - support for 3.0A, 1.5A and default amperage. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_POWER_ROLE_MASK` | macro | 408 | Mask for power roles supported. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_POWER_ROLE_SRC_OR_SNK` | macro | 412 | Value for support both source and sink only (no DRP) |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_POWER_ROLE_SRC` | macro | 414 | Value for support source role only. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_POWER_ROLE_SNK` | macro | 416 | Value for support sink role only. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_POWER_ROLE_SNK_ACC` | macro | 418 | Value for support sink role with accessory. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_POWER_ROLE_DRP` | macro | 420 | Value for support dual-role port only. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_POWER_ROLE_SRC_SNK_DRP_ADPT_CBL` | macro | 422 | Value for support source, sink, dual-role port, adapter and cable. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_POWER_ROLE_SRC_SNK_DRP` | macro | 424 | Value for support source, sink and dual-role port. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_ALL_SOP_STAR_MSGS_SUPPORTED` | macro | 426 | Bit for debug SOP' and SOP'' support - if set, all SOP* messages are supported. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SOURCE_VCONN` | macro | 428 | Bit for source vconn - if set, TCPC is capable of switching the vconn source. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SINK_VBUS` | macro | 430 | Bit for sink vbus - if set, TCPC is capable of controling the sink path to the system load. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SOURCE_HV_VBUS` | macro | 435 | Bit for source high voltage vbus. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_1_SOURCE_VBUS` | macro | 437 | Bit for source vbus - if set, TCPC is capable of controlling the source path to vbus. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2` | macro | 440 | Register address - device capabilities 2. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_CAP_3_SUPPORTED` | macro | 442 | Bit for device capabilities 3 support. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_MSG_DISABLE_DISCONNECT` | macro | 444 | Bit for message disable disconnect. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_GENERIC_TIMER` | macro | 446 | Bit for generic timer support. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_LONG_MSG` | macro | 453 | Bit for long message support If set, the TCPC supports up to 264 bytes content of the SOP*. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_SMBUS_PEC` | macro | 455 | Bit for SMBus PEC support. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_SRC_FRS` | macro | 457 | Bit for source fast-role swap support. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_SNK_FRS` | macro | 459 | Bit for sink fast-role swap support. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_WATCHDOG_TIMER` | macro | 461 | Bit for watchdog timer support. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_SNK_DISC_DET` | macro | 467 | Bit for sink disconnect detection. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_STOP_DISCHARGE_THRESH` | macro | 472 | Bit for stop discharge threshold. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VBUS_VOLTAGE_ALARM_MASK` | macro | 474 | Mask for resolution of voltage alarm. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VBUS_VOLTAGE_ALARM` | macro | 476 | Macro to extract the voltage alarm resolution from the register value. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VBUS_VOLTAGE_ALARM_25MV` | macro | 479 | Value for 25mV resolution of voltage alarm, all 10 bits of voltage alarm registers are used. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VBUS_VOLTAGE_ALARM_50MV` | macro | 481 | Value for 50mV resolution of voltage alarm, only 9 bits of voltage alarm registers are used. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VBUS_VOLTAGE_ALARM_100MV` | macro | 483 | Value for 100mV resolution of voltage alarm, only 8 bits of voltage alarm registers are used. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_POWER_SUPPORTED_MASK` | macro | 485 | Mask for vconn power supported. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_POWER_SUPPORTED` | macro | 487 | Macro to extract the vconn power supported from the register value. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_POWER_SUPPORTED_1_0W` | macro | 490 | Value for vconn power supported of 1.0W. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_POWER_SUPPORTED_1_5W` | macro | 492 | Value for vconn power supported of 1.5W. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_POWER_SUPPORTED_2_0W` | macro | 494 | Value for vconn power supported of 2.0W. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_POWER_SUPPORTED_3_0W` | macro | 496 | Value for vconn power supported of 3.0W. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_POWER_SUPPORTED_4_0W` | macro | 498 | Value for vconn power supported of 4.0W. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_POWER_SUPPORTED_5_0W` | macro | 500 | Value for vconn power supported of 5.0W. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_POWER_SUPPORTED_6_0W` | macro | 502 | Value for vconn power supported of 6.0W. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_POWER_SUPPORTED_EXTERNAL` | macro | 504 | Value for external vconn power supported. |
| `TCPC_REG_DEV_CAP_2_VCONN_OVC_FAULT` | macro | 506 | Bit for vconn overcurrent fault capable - if set, TCPC can detect the vconn over current. |
| `TCPC_REG_STD_INPUT_CAP` | macro | 509 | Register address - standard input capabilities. |
| `TCPC_REG_STD_INPUT_CAP_SRC_FRS_MASK` | macro | 511 | Mask for source fast role swap. |

| `TCPC_REG_STD_OUTPUT_CAP_ACTIVE_CABLE` | macro | 538 | Bit for active cable indicator. |

| `TCPC_REG_CONFIG_EXT_1_STD_IN_SRC_FRS` | macro | 560 | Bit for standard input source FR swap. |

| `USB_MAX_FS_INT_MPS` | macro | 82 | full speed MPS for interrupt EP |
| `USB_MAX_FS_ISO_MPS` | macro | 83 | full speed MPS for isochronous EP |
